Test Description: Check reset values and masked write/read for registers in addr_array using read_mask_array,write_mask_array,default_value_array.
Test Steps/Procedure: 1) Call chk_rst_val; for i=0..CNT-1: addr=addr_array[i]; if (skip_rst_array[i]==1) continue; if (read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000) continue; data_rd=read_reg(addr); data=(data_rd & 0xfffffffe); compare to default_value_array[i]; on mismatch increment def_fail_cnt. 2) Call chk_rd_wr; for each data_wr in {0xffffffff,0xaaaaaaaa,0x55555555,0xf5f5f5f5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xffff0000}: for i=0..CNT-1: addr=addr_array[i]; if (skip_array[i]==1) continue; if (write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000) continue; write_reg(addr,(data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); Reading phase: for i=0..CNT-1: if (skip_array[i]==1) continue; if (write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000) continue; if (read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000) continue; data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff); exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); compare data_rd to exp_val; on mismatch increment wr_fail_cnt. 3) If (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) finish(1); else finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if def_fail_cnt==0 and wr_fail_cnt==0 resulting in finish(0). For each address in chk_rst_val: (read_reg(addr) & 0xfffffffe) == default_value_array[i]. For each address in chk_rd_wr: (read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]) == ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])). Any mismatch increments def_fail_cnt or wr_fail_cnt and leads to finish(1).

Test Description: Enable per-pin negedge interrupt and verify group and raw status using MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 and MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1 with system interrupt via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 and clear via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1.
Test Steps/Procedure: 1) Optionally enable GIC IRQ 87/88 (GPIO0/GPIO1). 2) Enable system interrupt: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR/LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR). 3) write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0xffffffff). 4) For i=0..31: addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); write_reg(addr1,(1u<<20)|(1u<<18)|(1u<<16)). 5) For each i: wr_val=(1u<<i); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,wr_val); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,wr_val); int_pend=1; write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0xffffffff); wait_on(30); write_reg(0xA0243ffc,~wr_val); poll with timeout until int_pend==0. 6) In Default_IRQHandler: int_pend=0; write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0xffffffff); raddr=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); rdata=read_reg(raddr); if ((rdata & 0x1)!=0) test_err++; if ((rdata & 0x2)!=0x0) { rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if ((rdata_grp & (1u<<i))==0) test_err++; write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),(1u<<20)|(1u<<16)); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,(1u<<i)); rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if (rdata_grp!=0x0) test_err++; write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR/LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88); } else { test_err++; } 7) finish(test_err).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - No timeout while waiting for interrupt (else prints ERROR: Timeout waiting for GPIO%u negedge interrupt"). - In ISR: (rdata & 0x1) == 0. - (read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & (1u<<i)) != 0 before clear. - After clearing via per-pin write and MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1: read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) == 0x0."

Test Description: Enable posedge interrupt on all pads and validate group status via MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1, clear per-pin raw via MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4), and clear system raw via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1.
Test Steps/Procedure: 1) Optionally enable GIC IRQ 87/88 (GPIO0/GPIO1). 2) Enable system interrupt: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR/LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR). 3) For i=0..31: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),0x00020000). 4) Configure IO control: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1,0x000000FF); ... GROUP4, then wait_on(10). 5) Enable group interrupt: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF). 6) For i=0..31: write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0x00000000); wait_on(10); int_pend=1; write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0xFFFFFFFF); poll with timeout until int_pend==0; then write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0x00000000). 7) In Default_IRQHandler: wr_val=(1<<i); int_pend=0; rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0x00000000); if ((rdata_grp & 0xffffffff)!=0) ok else error. For j=0..31: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4),0x00010000); wait_on(2); rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if (rdata_grp==0x0) ok else error. Clear system raw: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR/LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); read back and check cleared; re-enable write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88). 8) finish(test_err).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - No timeout while waiting for interrupt (else prints ERROR: Timeout waiting for GPIO IRQ at i=%u"). - In ISR before clear: (read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & 0xffffffff) != 0. - After per-pin clear and group clear: read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) == 0x0. - After write to MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1
Code Generation(Required/Not): read back shows relevant GPIO0/GPIO1 bit cleared."
